description: JOIN of a small and a large predicate
query:
PREFIX bsbm: <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/bizer/bsbm/v01/vocabulary/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count)
WHERE { ?s bsbm:productPropertyNumeric6 ?o1 . ?s rdf:type ?o2 }

description: JOIN of a large and a small predicate
query:
PREFIX bsbm: <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/bizer/bsbm/v01/vocabulary/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count)
WHERE { ?s rdf:type ?o1 . ?s bsbm:productPropertyNumeric6 ?o2 }

description: JOIN of two large predicates
query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count)
WHERE { ?s rdf:type ?o1 . ?s dc:publisher ?o2 }

description: JOIN of two predicates with the largest possible result
JOIN of two large predicates with a reasonably large result
JOIN of two large predicates with a small result
JOIN star of three large predicates with the largest sum of join sizes
query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?s dc:publisher ?o1 .
  ?s rdf:type ?o2 .
  ?s dc:date ?o3 .
}

description: JOIN chain of three large predicates with the largest sum of join sizes
query:
PREFIX bsbm: <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/bizer/bsbm/v01/vocabulary/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?a bsbm:product ?b .
  ?b rdf:type ?c .
  ?c rdfs:comment ?d .
}

description: JOIN star of many small predicates
query:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX bsbm: <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/bizer/bsbm/v01/vocabulary/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count)
WHERE {
 
  ?s bsbm:productPropertyNumeric6 ?o0 .
 
  ?s rdfs:subClassOf ?o1 .
 
  ?s foaf:homepage ?o2 .
 
}

description: JOIN chain of many small predicates
query:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX bsbm: <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/bizer/bsbm/v01/vocabulary/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?count)
WHERE {
 
  ?v0 bsbm:productPropertyNumeric6 ?v1 .
 
  ?v1 rdfs:subClassOf ?v2 .
 
  ?v2 foaf:homepage ?v3 .
 
}

query:

WHERE { ?s rdf:type ?o }

query:
SELECT (COUNT(?s) AS ?count)
WHERE { ?s ?p ?o }

description: Total number of distinct subjects
query:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?s) AS ?count)
WHERE { ?s ?p ?o }

description: Total number of distinct predicates
query:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?p) AS ?count)
WHERE { ?s ?p ?o }

description: Total number of distinct objects
query:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?o) AS ?count)
WHERE { ?s ?p ?o }

description: Total number of literals
query:
SELECT (COUNT(?o) AS ?count)
WHERE { ?s ?p ?o FILTER ISLITERAL(?o) }

description: Total number of blank nodes
query:
SELECT (COUNT(?s) AS ?count)
WHERE { ?s ?p ?o FILTER ISBLANK(?s) }
